message:
feat(text): Add undo/redo and selection to Editor core (bd-3ky.6)

Extends the existing Editor with:
- Undo/redo history with configurable max depth
- Selection support (anchor/head model) with extend methods
- Selection-aware insert/delete (replaces selection on edit)
- select_left/right/up/down/word_left/word_right/all
- selected_text() accessor
- 42 tests passing including undo roundtrips and selection edits

Also exports Editor and Selection from ftui-text crate root.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
